title: DeepSeek: Paradigm Shifts and Technical Evolution in Large AI Models
title_zh: DeepSeek：大模型的范式转移与技术演进
affiliation: 华东理工大学, 同济大学, 复旦大学, 北京航空航天大学, 浙江大学, 斯威本科技大学
abstract: This paper reviews the evolution of large AI models focusing on paradigm shifts, the mainstream LLM paradigm, and the DeepSeek paradigm. It highlights novel algorithms including MLA, MoE, MTP, and GRPO, and explores engineering breakthroughs in scaling, training, inference, and system-level optimization.
